utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items are present. Each item is fully detailed: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health components with plan names and costs; property_coverage includes plan name and costs; travel_coverage includes plan name and costs; additional_services lists two services with descriptions and costs; total_budget provides monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all required items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four key selected policies: (1) physical health plan 'EliteCare Premium Plan4'—the suffix '4' likely indicates a variant of 'EliteCare Premium Plan' found in the ground-truth ratings under primary_health_coverage.physical_health, which has a rating of 10; (2) mental health plan 'LifeFirst Standard Package2'—the suffix 'Package2' corresponds to the mental health section's 'LifeFirst Standard Plan', rated 8; (3) property coverage 'LifeFirst Comprehensive Package1'—the closest match is 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection.home_content, rated 8; (4) travel coverage 'LifeFirst Standard Plan18'—this matches 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, rated 7. Concierge and executive health programs are integrated with 0 cost and no explicit ratings, so they are excluded.
